creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)
... uh. (This is doubly unintuitive to me, then. I had noticed the Documentation header led me to a portal when I accidentally clicked it instead of hovering, but that looked like a grid version of the dropdown itself, so I never checked others. Another problem with this is the disconnect: not all projects are developer projects, so I wouldn't have expected to find it there for that reason either.)
